message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Weather Report: Complete Build Guide & Stand Awakening 2026",
  description: "Unleash the full potential of Weather Report in Bizarre Lineage with our comprehensive guide. Learn how to obtain this powerful Stand, master its abilities, optimize your builds, and achieve Stand Awakening in 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/3B82F6/fff?text=Weather+Report+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- Mastering **Bizarre Lineage Weather Report** requires understanding its unique abilities and optimal pairings.
- Obtain Weather Report primarily via **Stand Arrow** or a **Weather Report Disc** from Jotaro Part 6.
- Pair Weather Report with **Kendo** or **Spin** for maximum combat effectiveness and combo potential.
- Achieving **Stand Awakening** involves specific quests, including defeating bosses and completing world events.
- Utilize Weather Report's powerful **AoE attacks** and mid-range combat for efficient PvE farming and PvP dominance.
</Callout>

Welcome, Bizarre Lineage enthusiasts! If you're looking to harness the power of one of the most versatile and devastating Stands in the game, you've come to the right place. The **Bizarre Lineage Weather Report** is a force to be reckoned with, offering an unparalleled blend of area-of-effect damage, crowd control, and strategic depth. This comprehensive guide will walk you through everything you need to know, from acquiring this formidable Stand to mastering its complex abilities and unlocking its true potential through Stand Awakening. Prepare to dominate both PvE and PvP encounters as we delve into the intricacies of Weather Report in 2026.

<Section icon={Map} title="Weather Report Overview & Acquisition">

Weather Report stands out as one of the best PvE farming Stands in *Bizarre Lineage*, boasting an A-Tier overall ranking. Its ability to control the environment and unleash devastating area-of-effect attacks makes it a valuable asset for any player. This Stand originates from Part 6 of JoJo's Bizarre Adventure, celebrated for its unique and impactful abilities.

**Video Highlights:**
- Demonstrates Weather Report's powerful ranged and AoE attacks.
- Showcases the "electric ball" and "knockback" skills.
- Highlights the ultimate ability to freeze enemies with an ice spear.
- Illustrates its potential for high damage output against NPCs.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="N0bhlrp3G8A" title="WEATHER REPORT Is INSANE… Full Showcase | Bizarre Lineage" />

Acquiring Weather Report involves distinct methods, each with its own challenges. The primary method is through the **Stand Arrow**, which offers a moderate drop rate. Many players find success obtaining it within a few attempts using this approach. Alternatively, a more direct but challenging route involves defeating Jotaro Part 6.

| Acquisition Method | Details | Rarity/Difficulty | Notes |
| :----------------- | :------ | :---------------- | :---- |
| **Stand Arrow** | Uses a Stand Arrow item | Moderate drop rate | Most common method, relies on RNG. |
| **Weather Report Disc** | Dropped by **Jotaro Part 6** (7.5% chance) | High difficulty, Low drop rate | Requires Worthiness 2+, guaranteed WR if disc obtained. |

<Callout type="tip" title="Acquisition Strategy">
For new players, focusing on **Stand Arrow** farming might be more accessible. However, if you're up for a challenge and have the necessary Worthiness, farming Jotaro Part 6 for the **Weather Report Disc** offers a guaranteed acquisition once the disc drops.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Mastering Weather Report's Abilities">

Weather Report's move set is designed for versatile combat, excelling in mid-range engagements with powerful AoE and crowd control options. Understanding each ability is crucial for maximizing your impact in *Bizarre Lineage*.

| Key | Move Name | Type | Damage/Effect | Notes |
| :-- | :-------- | :--- | :------------ | :---- |
| **E** | Barrage / Stand Barrage | Melee | 1.2 damage/tick (Web 2) | Volley of hits, blockable. |
| **R** | Lightning Strike / Stand Barrage Finisher | Ranged | 200 total damage (YT 2) / 14 damage (Web 2) | Electric ball, unblockable but parriable finisher. |
| **T** | Soaring Tempest | AoE | 25 damage over distance | Summons a tornado, blockable. |
| **Y** | Hazardous Forecast | AoE | 6 damage/hit (6 hits, 36 total) | Electrical orb, blockable. |
| **Z** | Cloud Suit / Frog Rain | Buff / AoE | Enhances defense / Rain frogs | Cloud armor buff / Frogs deal poison damage (upgraded). |
| **X** | Heavy Rain / Ice Spikes | AoE / Block Break | Large AoE damage over time / Knock enemies | Follows you, does DoT / Upgraded causes bleeding. |
| **C** | Frog Rain (Web 1) / Knockback (YT 2) | AoE | High damage knockback | AoE, second hit is knockback (YT 2). |
| **G** | Heavy Weather | Block Bypassing | Reduces defense by 20% | Turns enemies into snails, removes legs. |
| **H** | Atmospheric Manipulation | Buff / Slow | Slows enemies, cloud armor | Summons tempest, enhances defense. |
| **M1** | Standard Punches | Melee | 7 damage/hit, 10.5 crit | Combo up to 5 times. |
| **RMB** | Heavy Punch | Melee | 9 damage | Quickly charged punch, knocks opponent. |

<Callout type="warning" title="Ability Synergy">
While many of Weather Report's abilities are potent on their own, their true strength lies in their synergy. Experiment with combining moves like **Heavy Weather** to reduce defense, followed by **Hazardous Forecast** or **Soaring Tempest** for burst damage.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Optimal Builds & Strategic Play">

To truly excel with the **Bizarre Lineage Weather Report**, strategic pairing with fighting styles and an understanding of matchups are paramount. Choosing the right build can significantly enhance your combat performance, whether you're engaging in PvP or grinding through PvE content.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Recommended PvP Setup">
    - **Fighting Style:** Kendo / Spin
    - **Focus:** Maximize combo potential and burst damage.
    - **Strategy:** Utilize Weather Report's crowd control to set up Kendo or Spin attacks.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Counters & Matchups">
    - **Strong Against:** Killer Queen
    - **Weak Against:** King Crimson
    - **Advice:** Adapt your playstyle based on opponent's Stand.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Common Mistakes to Avoid">
    - **Ignoring Fighting Style:** Never use WR without Kendo or Spin.
    - **Rushing Awakening:** Farm efficiently before attempting the Awakening quest.
    - **Ignoring Matchups:** Always know your counters and play around them.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="tip">
For optimal combat performance, pairing **Weather Report** with **Kendo** is highly recommended. Kendo's fast-paced attacks and defensive capabilities complement Weather Report's AoE and mid-range prowess, creating devastating combos.
</Callout>

<Checklist
  id="weather-report-strategy"
  title="Essential Weather Report Combat Tips:"
  items={[
    "Always pair with a fighting style (Kendo/Spin).",
    "Utilize AoE skills for crowd control in PvE.",
    "Master mid-range engagements; avoid close-quarters without an advantage.",
    "Be aware of your counters (e.g., King Crimson) in PvP.",
    "Prioritize Stand Awakening after reaching 100 conjugation points."
  ]}
/>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Achieving Stand Awakening for Weather Report">

Unlocking the Stand Awakening for your **Bizarre Lineage Weather Report** is a significant milestone, granting enhanced abilities and a substantial power boost. This process requires dedication and involves a series of challenging tasks. Weather Report specifically requires **100 conjugation points** before you can even begin the Awakening questline.

**Video Highlights:**
- Shows how to initiate the Stand Awakening quest at Bus Stop 2.
- Explains the initial quest to defeat specific raid bosses.
- Details the challenging requirement of completing 50 world events.
- Guides on fighting "yourself" in the meditative realm to progress.
- Confirms the damage and HP buffs received upon successful Awakening.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="n21tqQKtKA4" title="How to ACTUALLY Get Stand Awakening (FULL GUIDE & SHOWCASE) | Bizarre Lineage" />

The path to awakening is not for the faint of heart, but the rewards are well worth the effort.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initiate the Quest">
    Travel to **Bus Stop 2** where the boxing gym is located. Enter the gym and find one of the sitting mats on the first floor. Press 'E' to meditate, which will transport you to your own personal realm. Talk to your reflection and select "I want to surpass my limits" to begin.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Defeat Raid Bosses">
    Your first mission is to defeat **Jodo, Abdul, and Dio** once each. There are no specific difficulty requirements for these raids.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Complete World Events">
    This is often the most time-consuming part: complete **50 world events**. To speed this up, consider AFK farming in a private server with an alt account or friends, repeatedly looping events.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Confront Yourself">
    Return to your meditate realm and defeat your reflection **13 times**. This tests your resolve and prepares you for the final challenge.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Face the Awakening Boss">
    After defeating yourself 13 times, you can fight a special boss for your awakening. Although quest dialogue might be bugged, you can still initiate the fight by pressing "I want to surpass my limits" again. Defeat this boss, and you will achieve Stand Awakening.
  </Step>
</Steps>

| Awakening Requirement | Description | Status |
| :-------------------- | :---------- | :----- |
| **Conjugation Points** | 100 points on your Stand | Mandatory |
| **Defeat Jodo, Abdul, Dio** | Once each | Completed |
| **Complete World Events** | 50 events | Time-consuming |
| **Defeat Self in Realm** | 13 times | Repetitive |
| **Awakening Boss Fight** | Once | Final Challenge |

<Callout type="success" title="Awakening Benefits">
Upon successful Stand Awakening, your **Weather Report** will receive significant buffs, including a **full HP restoration** and a considerable **damage increase**. Remember that you need to be at 100 conjugation points with your Stand for the awakening to apply.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get Weather Report in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "Weather Report is primarily obtained through the **Stand Arrow**, which has a moderate drop rate. Alternatively, you can acquire a **Weather Report Disc** by defeating Jotaro Part 6, which guarantees the Stand if you have Worthiness 2+."
  },
  {
    question: "What are the best fighting styles for Bizarre Lineage Weather Report?",
    answer: "The recommended fighting styles for Weather Report are **Kendo** and **Spin**. Kendo is particularly effective for maximizing combo potential and complementing Weather Report's AoE capabilities."
  },
  {
    question: "Does Weather Report have an Awakening, and how do I get it?",
    answer: "Yes, Weather Report has a Stand Awakening. You need 100 conjugation points on your Stand. The process involves initiating a quest at Bus Stop 2, defeating specific raid bosses, completing 50 world events, defeating your reflection 13 times, and finally, defeating an Awakening boss."
  },
  {
    question: "What are Weather Report's strengths and weaknesses?",
    answer: "Weather Report is strong against **Killer Queen** and excels in PvE farming due to its powerful AoE. However, it is generally weak against **King Crimson**. Understanding these matchups is crucial for PvP success."
  }
]} />

</Section>
